name: add-malli-schemas
tagline: Adds Malli request/response validation schemas to Metabase's Clojure API endpoints following house conventions.
verdict: Strong, concrete guide with worked before/after examples, a checklist, and a clear pitfalls list covering validation timing and nullability. Weak spots: description never states an explicit trigger phrase, no NOT-for scope note, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: Description states what the skill does but never phrases when to trigger it (no 'use when ...' cue).
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope section anywhere in description or body.
No version field or changelog anywhere in frontmatter or body.
